messages.content:
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="6">
<summary>Thought for 6 seconds</summary>
> **Deciphering the Greeting**
> 
> I've examined the input "hinihao." My analysis reveals it's likely a creative mashup of "hi" and "ni hao" (你好), the Chinese greeting. I believe the user intends a friendly hello.
> 
> 
> **Understanding the User's Intent**
> 
> I'm now refining my response. I considered both simple and playful options, landing on a hybrid. I settled on "Hello! Ni hao! 👋 How can I help you today?" This balances approachability with acknowledgment of the mixed-language greeting, ensuring a welcoming and helpful tone, and offering assistance.
> 
> 
</details>
Hello! Ni hao! 👋

How can I help you today? / 有什么我可以帮你的吗？
